overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic rooftop garden in a cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), transitioning from an enclosed planter corridor to an open panoramic terrace overlooking a sprawling metropolis with industrial towers and flying vehicles. The footage features high-quality ray-traced lighting during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop garden walkway with tropical planters

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through a corridor formed by tall concrete planters filled with tropical palm trees and reflective glass walls

entered.detail: tall rectangular concrete planter box with dense tropical vegetation
central concrete planter creating a corridor effect
tall concrete planter on the right side of the walkway
tall palm trees and ferns growing in the planters
reflective glass building facade creating mirror-like reflections
futuristic skyscrapers visible through gaps between structures

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a semi-enclosed rooftop garden corridor. Tall concrete planters filled with lush tropical vegetation line both sides, creating a narrow pathway. A reflective glass curtain wall on the right mirrors the warm golden hour sunlight, while distant cyberpunk skyscrapers are visible through gaps ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop terrace overlooking cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: exiting the enclosed planter corridor onto the open rooftop terrace with panoramic city views
slowing to a stop and beginning to pan right to observe the sprawling cityscape

agents.ego_description: standing at the terrace edge observing the futuristic industrial skyline with elevated highways and smokestacks

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier at the edge of the rooftop terrace
curved multi-level highway interchange below the terrace
tall brutalist towers with industrial smoke emissions
white smoke rising from industrial stacks on the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the enclosed walkway onto an open rooftop terrace revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of a cyberpunk metropolis. A glass safety railing marks the edge, beyond which lies a complex network of elevated highways and industrial skyscrapers emitting smoke. The warm golden hour light bathes the brutalist architecture as the camera slows to take in the vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop observation deck with pergola seating area

events.description: flying vehicles appear in the sky, moving across the cityscape
camera pans right revealing wooden pergola structure and outdoor seating area

agents.ego_description: panning slowly across the terrace to observe flying traffic and rooftop amenities while taking in the panoramic city view

notable_agents.action: flying vehicles moving across the sky above the cityscape

entered.detail: futuristic flying cars traversing the sky between buildings
modern wooden frame structure providing partial shade
outdoor furniture arranged under the pergola

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the full extent of the rooftop terrace as the camera pans right. Flying vehicles traverse the sky between industrial towers, while a modern wooden pergola with outdoor seating comes into view on the right. The tropical vegetation now appears on the right side as the perspective shifts, maintaining the warm golden hour atmosphere throughout the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded rooftop garden corridor into a vast, open panoramic terrace overlooking a futuristic metropolis. It begins by gliding through a narrow pathway lined with lush tropical vegetation in concrete planters, where a reflective glass wall mirrors the warm golden hour sunlight. As the camera emerges from the enclosed walkway, the space opens abruptly into a wide terrace bounded by a glass railing, revealing a sprawling cityscape of brutalist architecture and smoking industrial towers. The scene then expands as the camera pans right, shifting the perspective to reveal flying vehicles traversing the sky and a modern wooden pergola with outdoor seating. Finally, the view settles on the intersection of the rooftop's greenery and the distant, glowing urban horizon under the persistent golden light.
